Sound Familiar?

YOUR CONTENT
ISN'T WORKING.

01
😶
You're posting but nobody's watching

You put in the effort, hit publish, and get… crickets. 50 views, 3 likes, no growth. You don't know what you're doing wrong.

→ I fix your hook, format & strategy
02
🎨
Your visuals look DIY, not professional

Your content doesn't match the quality of your product. It's giving "random person" not "trusted brand." People scroll past without a second thought.

→ I build your visual identity from scratch
03
🌍
You need to reach two audiences at once

Russian-speaking and English-speaking audiences need different angles, tone, and content. Most creators pick one and lose the other completely.

→ I create bilingual content that converts both
04
📉
You went viral once and never again

One post blew up and you've been chasing that feeling since. You don't have a repeatable system — just hope and copy-paste trends.

→ I build the system that makes it repeatable
05
🎬
You hate being on camera — or don't know how

Talking head content is the highest-converting format right now, but most people freeze up or come across flat and unnatural on screen.

→ I direct, script & edit your talking head videos
06
⏰
You don't have time to do it right

You run a business. Content should be growing it, not consuming all your time. You need a partner who handles it while you focus on what you do best.

→ I handle everything — strategy to publish
Who I Am
ZHASMIN
SYDYKOVA
Social Media Designer & Viral Strategist

I'm a bilingual content creator and strategist who specialises in building social media presences that actually grow. I combine sharp visual design with a deep understanding of what makes content spread — hooks, formats, algorithms, human psychology.

I work in both Russian and English, which means I can reach CIS audiences and global audiences in the same campaign — a rare advantage most designers can't offer.

My signature is talking head content — I script, direct and edit videos where the person on screen is the brand. Paired with my voiceover style and editing rhythm, it's the format behind my biggest results.

What I Do

SERVICES THAT DELIVER

🎬
Talking Head Video Production
Full production from script to final edit. I direct, film, and edit talking head content that converts. Includes voiceover work and signature editing style.
🌍
Bilingual Content Strategy
Reach Russian and English audiences simultaneously. I create culturally adapted content that resonates with both markets without losing authenticity.
📱
Social Media Design & Editing
Visual identity, thumbnail design, motion graphics, and signature editing style. Every piece is optimized for platform algorithms and audience engagement.
📊
Viral Strategy & Growth
Data-driven approach to content that spreads. Hook optimization, format selection, posting strategy, and audience psychology applied to your brand.
🎙️
Voiceover & Audio Production
Professional voiceover work in Russian and English. Includes audio editing, sound design, and integration with video content.
🚀
Content Calendar & Planning
Strategic content planning, posting schedules, and campaign management. I handle the strategy so you can focus on growing your business.
Where I Operate

PRIMARY PLATFORMS

I specialize in creating viral content across the platforms where your audience actually spends time. Each platform requires different strategies, formats, and optimization — I know exactly what works where.
